commands.result: jco stopped while resolving the local WIT world before evaluating the Astro handler.

blocker.summary: jco componentize does not provide wasi:http WIT packages automatically; the validation must vendor or generate the official wasi:http dependency graph before it can test the Astro handler.

secondaryRisk.summary: The generated Astro 7 server bundle references Node-specific surfaces such as node:module, process, Buffer, and sharp chunks. This was not reached by the failing componentize command and remains the likely next compatibility check after WIT resolution.

nextAction: Vendor the official wasi:http WIT dependency graph locally or generate it from a known-good WASI HTTP component, then rerun the componentize script.
